description: Total expenses for a year with by-category and by-month breakdowns. Answers "what did I spend on software this year?" or "where is my money going?"

description.name: list_recent_expenses
description.description: List the most recent expenses, newest first, optionally filtered by category. Answers "what are my latest expenses?"

description.name: get_cost_summary
description.description: All business costs for a period — expenses, mileage, and contractor bills — with by-category and by-month breakdowns. Answers "what were my total costs last quarter?"

description.name: list_bills_owed
description.description: List the contractor/vendor bills the business still owes, with balance due and how overdue each is. Answers "what bills do I still need to pay?"

description.name: get_profitability
description.description: Revenue vs. costs, net profit, and margin over a period, optionally broken down by client. Answers "am I profitable this year?" or "which client is most profitable?"

description.name: get_tax_deductions
description.description: Deductible costs mapped onto the lines of the tax return the business actually files (Schedule C, 1120, 1120-S, 1065, or 990), with entity-aware treatment (meals at 50%, etc.). Answers "what are my deductions this year and where do they land on my return?"

description.name: get_1099_summary
description.description: Summary of the 1099-NEC amounts owed to contractors for a tax year, per vendor and in total, with the filing deadline. Answers "which contractors need a 1099 this year?"

description.name: list_clients
description.description: List the subscriber’s clients with their billing profile, optionally filtered by a name/notes search. Answers "who are my clients?"

description.name: get_client_summary
description.description: A single client’s summary: total invoiced, paid, outstanding, expenses, active projects, and last invoice date. Answers "how much has Acme paid me and what do they still owe?"

description.name: list_projects
description.description: List projects with their client, type, budget, and dates, optionally filtered to active-only. Answers "what projects am I working on?"

description.name: get_project_summary
description.description: A single project’s summary: hours logged vs. budget, billable hours, expenses, and mileage. Answers "how many hours are left in the Acme redesign budget?"

description.name: get_time_summary
description.description: Hours logged over a period, split billable vs. non-billable and broken down by project. Answers "how many hours did I bill last month?"

description.name: get_cash_summary
description.description: Cash position from bank activity: money in, money out, net, and how many transactions still need review. Answers "how much cash has moved through my accounts?"

description.name: list_uncategorized_transactions
description.description: List bank transactions still waiting to be categorized/reviewed, with a count and total. Answers "what bank transactions still need categorizing?"

description.name: get_goals_progress
description.description: Progress toward the subscriber’s business goals: each outcome, its success signals, current vs. target, and percent complete. Answers "how am I tracking against my goals this year?"

description.name: get_business_profile
description.description: The business’s own profile: legal name, entity type, the tax return it files, accounting method, fiscal year, industry, and address. Answers "what tax form does my business file and what is my fiscal year?"

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_contact_history, get_contact_summary, get_cash_summary · Private data: get_contact_history, get_contact_summary, get_tax_deductions, get_business_profile · Public sink: get_contact_history, get_contact_summary.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_contact_history, get_contact_summary, get_cash_summary · Private data: get_contact_history, get_contact_summary, get_tax_deductions, get_business_profile · Public sink: get_contact_history, get_contact_summary

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
